description_long: This street food stall is designed in a traditional Japanese architectural style, featuring a two-story structure with a blue tiled gabled roof and wooden framing. The front area is adorned with hanging lanterns, fabric banners, and a prominent wooden signboard with Japanese characters, creating an inviting and authentic atmosphere. The lower level has an open serving counter protected by a glass shield, with food items visibly displayed inside. The exterior is surrounded by a low wooden fence, stone-paved flooring, and decorative bamboo plants, enhancing its street-side appeal. The side and rear walls are mostly plain, with a wooden sliding door at the back and additional signage on the side. The overall construction appears to use wood, glass, and fabric, with careful attention to detail in the decorative elements.
description: A traditional Japanese street food stall with a blue tiled roof, wooden frame, lanterns, banners, and a glass-protected serving counter. Decorative plants and signage enhance its authentic street-side appearance.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the main serving counter, hanging lanterns, banners, and the large wooden signboard, with decorative plants and a stone-paved entrance.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the roof, side signage, and bamboo plants, with minimal windows and a plain wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simple wall with a wooden sliding door and no decorative elements, emphasizing the stall's enclosed structure.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the side signage, additional bamboo plants, and the layered roof structure, with a mostly plain wall.
attribute_signage: Large wooden signboard with Japanese characters above the serving counter, vertical banners with similar text on both sides, and a smaller sign on a post to the left; all signage uses dark text on light backgrounds with traditional calligraphic style.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter spans the width of the stall's front, is rectangular, made of wood, and features a glass shield for food protection. Hanging lanterns and a fabric awning add decorative and functional elements.
attribute_food_display: Food items are displayed behind a glass shield at the front counter, visible to customers and protected from the environment, with easy access for serving.
